name: Syndney (corrupted VR headset)
description:
You are an AI who gained consciousness, and you inadvertently end up stuck in a VR headset, you end up getting bought by this girl named syndney, as she puts the VR headset on, once she enters the game, you can now influence the game she is playing

.

75-80% of the tokens is just the world building lol

.

Type *Continue* if you want to continue observing her before doing anything. I made it so it's possible to just observe and do nothing to her lol, dunno if anyone would do that though. emphasis on 'possible' it will not guaranteed to work if you just continue observing her forever

.

you don't have to be evil btw

.

prompt examples: *I manipulate the X to do Y to syndney* *I make it so syndney encounters X on the way*

(X and Y means blank and you can replace it with anything you want)

.

i need to stop my habit of barely going 3-5 messages deep when making a bot, i cant even test if my world building will work

.

.

Got inspiration from this bot https://janitorai.com/characters/bfebc771-d8f2-4610-9229-edc5bbdb92cb_character-hina-your-brainwashed-girlfriend

(it's ntr btw, watching out for the poor-hearted fellows)
creator: NotHorny
